name: Kevin Astuhuaman
headline: AI Product Manager | Ex-PayPal AI/ML Observability | Berkeley Haas MBA '26
summary: Kevin Astuhuaman is an AI Product Manager, ex-PayPal in AI/ML observability, and Berkeley Haas MBA with seven years of experience building products.
recruitingLanes: AI platform and technical product management

experience.summary: Defined and prototyped an AI-assisted observability workflow for checkout diagnostics.
Built and operates a real-time job-search product across web, native apps, CLI, MCP, matching, chat, and voice.

experience.organization: UC Berkeley Haas Open Innovation Squad
experience.role: AI Product Manager, Fujitsu and MoBagel challenge
experience.summary: Worked on AI product adoption, a high-fidelity Figma prototype, roadmap, business model, and United States go-to-market recommendations for MoBagel.

experience.organization: Banco de Credito BCP (part of Credicorp)
experience.role: Product Analyst -> Product Manager -> Senior Product Manager -> Lead Product Manager
experience.summary: Progression: Lead Product Manager (1 year), Senior Product Manager (1.5 years), Product Manager (1.5 years), Product Analyst (2 years).

publicClaims.statement: Trackly monitored 1,969 company career sites across 40 ATS and source types, with 128,975 job records in its public inventory on July 12, 2026.
publicClaims.short: 1,969 company career sites across 40 source types
publicClaims.context: Dated inventory, not a user-adoption claim.

publicClaims.statement: Trackly is available publicly on Apple's App Store.
publicClaims.context: Public distribution artifact for the native product.

publicClaims.statement: A PayPal Checkout internship prototype reduced issue-detection time by 75% in the project workflow across a diagnostic environment spanning 15+ tools.
publicClaims.short: 75% faster issue detection in the internship prototype workflow
publicClaims.context: Prototype-workflow result, not a PayPal-wide production claim.

publicClaims.statement: At Banco de Credito BCP, Kevin's work helped more than 100,000 small businesses access a first loan.
publicClaims.context: Production small-business lending outcome; this claim stays in the BCP experience section, not the portfolio bio.

publicClaims.statement: Kevin designed and launched an online credit-evaluation platform that reduced evaluation time from seven days to one hour and generated $40M in incremental loan disbursements in nine months.
publicClaims.short: Seven days to one hour; $40M incremental disbursements

publicClaims.statement: Kevin redesigned BCP's digital value proposition for small businesses, contributing to 14% year-over-year revenue growth and growing monthly website traffic sixfold to 180,000 users in 15 months.
publicClaims.short: 14% revenue growth; monthly website traffic grew 6x to 180K
publicClaims.context: Production digital-channel outcome; 180K is monthly website traffic, not product MAU.

publicClaims.statement: Trackly ships a public command-line interface and Model Context Protocol server.
publicClaims.context: Public technical distribution artifact; separate from the App Store listing.

publicClaims.statement: Kevin's public AI Product Builder Stack documents 65 verified tools and product patterns across eight layers, with lifecycle states and implementation evidence.
publicClaims.short: 65 verified tools and patterns across eight capability layers
publicClaims.context: A maintained evidence map, not a claim that every tool is current production infrastructure.

publicClaims.statement: Kevin published Human Control Plane, an interactive product study that maps consequence, reversibility, model uncertainty, and intent freshness to four human-oversight patterns.
publicClaims.short: Four human-control patterns for consequential AI actions
publicClaims.context: A deterministic product-design study built with synthetic scenarios, not a production authorization framework.

publicClaims.statement: Kevin published AI Product Motion Studies, three interactive product-design studies with 13 inspectable states for workflow structure, accountable recovery, and cross-surface continuity.
publicClaims.short: Three motion studies with 13 inspectable product states
publicClaims.context: Original interfaces with synthetic data and a public motion contract, not employer product work or a disclosure of Trackly internals.

publicClaims.statement: Berkeley Haas's official past-challenges page lists the Fujitsu and MoBagel AI Business Adoption Acceleration Challenge.
publicClaims.short: Official Berkeley Fujitsu and MoBagel AI challenge
publicClaims.context: Official program context only. Kevin's participation and deliverables are public resume claims.
